Hello #KubeCon day three! (Or two? Or four? Five?? Counting is hard)

The famous Kubernetes dress returns, too. Catch me floating around if you can!

Hello KubeCon! I’m speaking today on building extensible platforms and I can’t wait. And for those of you building platform shaped projects… I have a challenge for you, if you’re feeling ambitious 👀

As always, please feel free to say hi if you see me!

We will be there this afternoon and Thursday afternoon. Hope to see you there!

I am, however, heading up to Vancouver on Thursday for #AtmosphereConf. Looking forward to learning a ton and meeting new people. If you see me please say hi!

The news is out. I was selected as the next KubeCon co-chair 🙌 I will be helping with the content for #KubeConNA26 #KubeConEU27 and #KubeConNA27 🙂

Thank you @cncf.io team for the trust and honor 🙌 and many many folks 🙂

Looking forward to this new adventure and let's keep Cloud Native Moving 💪🤟

😭😭😭🙏 I got so many compliments about the talk. And the most important validation came from the most active maintainer on the project.

Thanks for the guide. Docker is the fastest way to test MCP locally. For production Cloud Run offers cheap autoscaling, while Lambda suffers cold start latency. Cloudflare Workers shine at the edge. Kubernetes is powerful but usually overkill unless you already have a cluster.

SUSE is right that a single AI stack on Kubernetes saves a lot of time. Their operators handle model serving, scaling and RBAC out of the box, something you spend weeks building yourself. DIY gives freedom but the operational debt quickly outweighs the benefits.

What makes this even more special is that just last year at KubeCon Europe, I exchanged my book (𝘋𝘪𝘴𝘵𝘳𝘪𝘣𝘶𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘔𝘢𝘤𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘦 𝘓𝘦𝘢𝘳𝘯𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘗𝘢𝘵𝘵𝘦𝘳𝘯𝘴) with Roland’s previous one (𝘒𝘶𝘣𝘦𝘳𝘯𝘦𝘵𝘦𝘴 𝘗𝘢𝘵𝘵𝘦𝘳𝘯𝘴) and now he’s already published another book, this time with Daniele.

I was fortunate to get my hands on 𝘎𝘦𝘯𝘦𝘳𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘷𝘦 𝘈𝘐 𝘰𝘯 𝘒𝘶𝘣𝘦𝘳𝘯𝘦𝘵𝘦𝘴 before it’s even available for everyone to order online!

It was also great to meet the co-authors and my wonderful colleagues - Daniele Zonca and @ro14nd.bsky.social at KubeCon Europe.
